qoq_changes: Cash and cash equivalents increased to $17.38 billion from $14.16 billion at the end of the prior fiscal year
Merchandise inventories grew to $18.99 billion from $18.12 billion at the end of the prior fiscal year
Deferred membership fees increased to $3.13 billion from $2.85 billion at the end of the prior fiscal year
new_risks: Specific new risks were not disclosed in the provided financial statement excerpt
management_tone: Bullish, driven by strong top-line growth, double-digit increases in membership fee revenue, and expanding net income.
analyst_note: Costco delivered a strong quarter with total revenue growing 9.2% YoY to $69.6 billion and net income rising 13.8% to $2.04 billion. The consistent growth in membership fees and robust cash generation underscore the resilience and continued execution of its warehouse club model.
